sections.paragraph:
adjective

pure, clean, fine, white, virgin; unalloyed, refined; chest, unblemished, immaculate, impeccable, pristine, sheer, angelic, angelical

masculine noun טהור (>>טיהור)

purification, cleansing, decontamination; refining, depuration; purge, exoneration, sanctification, purgation, expurgation
